series_metadata.series_description: American Association of State Highway and Transportation Officials paperwork for assigning Federal Communication Commission frequencies to applicants. Checks PH and PX frequency bands for any possible interference. Checks other frequency coordinators FCC frequencies for interferences.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for one year in case of any problems or interference in future. ; Electronic: Retain for one year in case of any problems or interference in future., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
